heading: Today
text: Early clouds giving way to sunshine.  More afternoon clouds.  Continued cool.  Highs in the low to mid 50s.  Winds northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy, then more periods of clouds spreading northeast, with scattered rain or wet snow showers possible, more numerous over the higher terrain.  Lows in the 30s, near 30 across the higher terrain north.  Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Morning clouds, with a few rain or wet snow showers early.  Clouds breaking for periods of sunshine, with a chance of localized, passing rain showers.  Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s.  Winds light and variable.
